name: File Upload
summary: File upload control using `file-urn` format on a string property
whenToUse: Collecting document uploads like photos, certificates, or supporting documents
When the form requires file attachments alongside other data
notes: The `format: "file-urn"` on the data schema property enables the file upload control
No special UI schema options are needed — just a Control bound to the property
Uploaded files are stored via the ADSP File Service and referenced by URN
